approval_phrase: APPROVE EXECUTE WBS02 BATCH2 WRITE-READY SINGLE-SELECT MIGRATION PAYLOAD
wbs_scope: WBS02 Batch2 write-ready single-select migration payload only
approved_command_preview:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$baseId = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID','Machine')
$token = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_AIRTABLE_TOKEN','Machine')
$modulePath = Join-Path $repo 'operator_tools\github_desktop_lane\modules\Dcoir.AirtableBulkUpdate\Dcoir.AirtableBulkUpdate.psm1'
Import-Module -Force $modulePath
